## Book submission checklist

- [ ] My book is in a **public** GitHub repository
- [ ] I tested the book by loading it in the [reader app](https://book-of-infinite-tales.github.io) — it loads without errors
- [ ] The book contains **no official** *Tales of the Arthurian Knights* text or copyrighted material
- [ ] The `title` and `author` fields are filled in
- [ ] CI passes on this PR
